## Data Sources

* Tile: GeoSpatial Information Authority of Japan, [https://maps.gsi.go.jp/development/ichiran.html](https://maps.gsi.go.jp/development/ichiran.html)

* Municipalities: [https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-N03-2025.html](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-N03-2025.html)
* Healthcare areas: [https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A38-2020.html](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A38-2020.html)
* Snowfall: [https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A22-2016.html](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A22-2016.html)
* Mountainous areas: [https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A24-2016.html](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A24-2016.html)
* Agricultural areas: [https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A25-2016.html](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A25-2016.html)
* Peninsula: [https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A18-2016.html](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/ksj/gml/datalist/KsjTmplt-A18-2016.html)
